subtitle: Andhra Pradesh's only Blue Flag beach, a golden quartz crescent on the Bay of Bengal below a hill half-excavated for a disputed ₹450-crore government complex.
spike_statement: Andhra Pradesh's only Blue Flag beach, below a hill half-cut for a ₹450-crore complex a state panel identified as the chief minister's residence.

levers.photo_tone: Golden quartz sand curving below the green Rushikonda hill, the scar of the excavated slope and the pale complex visible above the shore, the Bay of Bengal hazy blue to the east
